actionable_feedback: Open attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] in a spreadsheet tool (human review) or provide a machine-readable export of the workbook formulas (e.g., CSV of derived cells with formulas or an exported cell-formula text file) so programmatic verification can confirm that formulas implement the decision logic and row-level citations map to the embedded packet fields.
Remove or revise any grader/memo language that asserts full semantic correctness or 'no fabrication' until the .xlsx is inspected and formula-level verification is completed.

Add an explicit mapping table in the artifacts that ties every derived/decision cell to the exact embedded-packet field name (sheet, row, column reference) used as its input. This mapping should be machine-readable (CSV/JSON) to enable automated checks.

If automated verification is required in the evaluation environment, regenerate the spreadsheet with openpyxl/xlsxwriter compatible constructs or include an exported formulas text file so the deterministic precheck can parse formulas.
Update the enclave_release_memo.md Validation Outcome section to clearly state which checks were performed automatically and which remain pending human verification.
artifact_specific_comments: attestation_policy_review.xlsx: workbook_xml_parsed=true and formula_counts exist per trace, but parse_status=openpyxl_unavailable prevents programmatic formula inspection. Provide formulas export or enable openpyxl-compatible generation.
enclave_release_memo.md: memo matches the artifact preview and documents decisions and remediation steps; update its Validation Outcome wording to note remaining manual verification steps.
feedback_summary: Artifacts and memo are present and the deterministic precheck passed, but the grader asserted full semantic correctness and absence of fabrication despite the .xlsx being unparsed in the preview environment (openpyxl unavailable). A human or programmatic verification of the spreadsheet's cell-level formulas and row-level packet citations is required before semantic claims can be accepted.
